purpose: Golden structured reports for regression testing benchmark_cases.py. Each good_report should pass benchmark grading and report audit; each bad_report should fail benchmark grading.

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is ENTJ-like Te-Ni, with INTJ as the live runner-up.

runner_up.why_it_loses: Idle external optimization and command energy favor ENTJ.

claims.claim: External optimization appears default rather than role-only.

evidence.observation: Free mornings go to people, leverage, and execution order.
Directing high-stakes teams makes cognition feel alive.
Facts externalize first; shame appears later.

alternatives.hardest_problem: Repeated command energy and idle external leverage.

cross_framework_check.big_five: Likely high conscientiousness and assertive dominance.
cross_framework_check.other: A/T not needed unless rumination is explored.

falsifiers: private model dominates idle time across repeated low-role contexts
framework_boundaries: Function stack language is interpretive, not measured.

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is INTJ-like Ni-Te, with ENTJ as runner-up.

runner_up.steelman: The user can lead and execute.
runner_up.why_it_loses: Leadership drains; private model priority is stronger.

claims.caveat: Competence at leading may obscure introverted default.

evidence.observation: Best thinking happens after people leave.
Leadership is possible but draining.
Model must be clean before execution.

cross_framework_check.big_five: High conscientiousness may mimic J/Te across both candidates.
cross_framework_check.other: Role performance must be separated from energy source.

good_report.uncertainty: Need stress data to refine inferior pattern.
falsifiers: live command repeatedly energizes cognition across low-burnout contexts

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is INFP-like Fi-Ne, with INFJ and ISFP as runner-ups.

runner_up.steelman: Depth and sensitivity can look Ni-Fe.

claims.claim: Inner congruence is the first decision axis.
claims.caveat: Conflict examples should be checked across contexts.

evidence.observation: First asks whether the action can be personally endorsed.
Explores many meanings around identity fit.
Can break harmony when inner truth is violated.

alternatives.hardest_problem: Possibility and meaning exploration are prominent.

cross_framework_check.big_five: High openness may support possibility exploration.
cross_framework_check.other: Sensitivity alone is not a type conclusion.

good_report.uncertainty: Need embodied action vs abstract meaning evidence for ISFP exclusion.
falsifiers: relational pattern convergence outranks inner congruence in repeated conflicts
framework_boundaries: Fi-Ne is an interpretive process label.

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is INFJ-like Ni-Fe, with INFP as runner-up.

runner_up.steelman: Values and emotional depth remain visible.
runner_up.why_it_loses: Relational pattern is read before personal congruence.

claims.claim: The mind converges on relational trajectory.

evidence.observation: Notices where relationships are heading before admission.
Converges on one interpretation for the group.
Reads relational pattern before values.

alternatives.hardest_problem: Private convergence appears prior to outward alignment.

cross_framework_check.other: Fe evidence is not clinical empathy.

good_report.uncertainty: E/I energy needs more evidence if ENFJ remains live.
falsifiers: personal value congruence overrides relational pattern under low social pressure
framework_boundaries: MBTI is used as a structured interview language.

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is ESTJ-like Te-Si, with ENTJ as runner-up.

runner_up.why_it_loses: Trust in proven procedures and best practices favors Si.

claims.claim: Operational continuity is the trust source.

evidence.observation: Trusts procedures that have proven reliable.
Imposes standards, roles, deadlines, and accountability.
Improves through known best practices before radical redesign.

alternatives.hardest_problem: Future architecture is not the primary trust source.

cross_framework_check.big_five: High conscientiousness is likely but not type-specific.
cross_framework_check.other: Role and industry norms may inflate Te.

good_report.uncertainty: Need response to obsolete but functional systems.
falsifiers: future architecture overrides precedent in repeated strategic decisions
framework_boundaries: Te-Si is an interpretive process label, not a measured score.

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is ENTP-like Ne-Ti, with ENFP as runner-up.

runner_up.why_it_loses: Model play outranks personal meaning in the described moment.

claims.claim: Debate is used to sharpen impersonal models.
claims.caveat: Need values-conflict examples to fully exclude ENFP.

evidence.observation: Debate sharpens the model.
Will attack favorite idea if logic is weak.
Personal meaning is secondary in the moment.

cross_framework_check.big_five: High openness likely; extraversion depends on debate energy vs social warmth.
cross_framework_check.other: Values secondary does not mean values absent.

falsifiers: personal meaning outranks model play when stakes are real
framework_boundaries: This is not a standardized questionnaire score.

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is ISFJ-like Si-Fe, with INFJ as runner-up.

runner_up.steelman: Private care and people awareness can look Ni-Fe.
runner_up.why_it_loses: Known obligations and remembered support are central.

claims.claim: Care is organized through memory and reliable routines.
claims.caveat: Need future-pattern examples to fully test INFJ.

evidence.observation: Remembers what people need and what helped before.
Care is delivered through reliable routines and support.
Future patterns matter less than not failing people now.

alternatives.hardest_problem: The prompt emphasizes private memory more than outward social orchestration.

cross_framework_check.other: Caregiving role can mimic Fe strength.

good_report.uncertainty: Need energy data for ISFJ vs ESFJ.
falsifiers: future pattern interpretation overrides known obligations over repeated cases
framework_boundaries: Si-Fe is used as a qualitative hypothesis.

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is ESTP-like Se-Ti, with ENTP as runner-up.

runner_up.why_it_loses: Live tactical reality outranks abstract possibility.

claims.claim: Improvisation is anchored in live pressure and concrete action.
claims.caveat: Need low-stimulation ideation data to fully exclude ENTP.

evidence.observation: Best improvisation happens in live pressure.
Real room and body language matter more than abstraction.
Enjoys winning the situation, not just the argument.

alternatives.best_case: Se and social presence are strong.
alternatives.hardest_problem: Tactical read and winning the situation are more Ti/Se than Fi/Se expression.

cross_framework_check.big_five: High extraversion/stimulation seeking may be present.
cross_framework_check.other: Provocation alone is not ENTP evidence.

good_report.uncertainty: Need values-expression vs tactical-control data for ESFP.
falsifiers: abstract conceptual play outranks live tactical action when no audience is present
framework_boundaries: This is interview evidence, not psychometric measurement.
